title: Beyond the Limit
overview: In the violent Buenos Aires suburbs: Two opposing police officers, an ex-convict, and a suicide at a collision point will cross paths, falling into a spiral of violence and twists and turns, crossing that thin line that puts everything at risk and in danger—that thin line that separates life from death.
